lines.text: I think I understand, Master. Life is like a battle, right? You need to see the big picture, know when to strike and when to pull back... to forge your own fate!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: That's right! You promised, Master! If you lost, you'd teach me whatever I want today!
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige

lines.text: Master, please, back to the forge—
lines.quest_name: All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
All Out! Towards the Peaks of Prestige
